headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - THIRD: (a) The Subcontractor is aware that the Contractor must have its contract with Owner performed in accordance with the project schedule prepared by the project superintendent. The Subcontractor agrees to perform the Subcontractor's Work in accordance with direction from the Contractor. Field Representative and Progress Schedule attached herewith entitled Exhibit "C" and made a part of this Subcontract, and to that end the Subcontractor will perform all work as required by the progress of the job and the instructions of the Contractor including overtime and extra shifts, if necessary, to maintain schedule at no additional cost.
